raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. Ta fakka tas KUNGS
us fawn Swaiditu Ko-
reju/ ka labbu Rohkn es
fativerru / ka es tahs Tautas
winna Breekfcha noinettu/ un to
Fehniku Johstas es atrafischu /
ka es preekich winna tahs Dur-
wis atdarru / un tahs Wahrtis
ne tapß nisflehgtas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Es eefchu tawa Breekfcha/
un darrischu tohs lihkus Zeltus
taisnus / tahs warrainas Dur-
wis es falansifchn/ un tohs dsel-
sainus Breekfchchanjamus es
tadausifchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Un es dobfchu tew tahs
Mantas/ kas Tuunsibā irr/ un to
paflehptu Baggatibu/ ka tu at-
fihft warri/ ka es tas KUNGS
efinu/ kas tewi pee Wahrdā fauz/
tas Israēta Decws.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Jehkaba manna Kalpa deht/
un Israēta manna Jswehleta
deht. Ir es nofanzu tewi pee ta-
wa Wahrdā/ es dewu tew tawu
Pawahrdu/ kad tu mannis wehī
ne pasinni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Es efinu tas KUNGS/
un ne zits wairak / neweens
Decws irr/bes ka es ween. Es
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Tadeht ka sinnams teh-
ka no Saules Uslehfschanas u
No-eefchanas neneeka irr be-
mannis: Es efmu tas KUNgā
un neweens zits wairak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Es padarru to Gaisim
un raddu to Tumfibā/ es dar-
Meern/ un raddu to Launu.
tas KUNGS darri tcho wisā
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Pilseet juhs Debbesis
angschenes/ un tahs Padebbe-
lai isleli to Taifnibu/lat ta Ser-
me atwerrahs/ un iswed Pes-
tchann/ un Taifniba lai kob-
isnug: Es tas KUNGS efn-
to raddijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Waj tam! kas ar fan-
Radditaju barrahs/ weens Po-
da Gabbals prett faiu Meis-
ri. Arrig tas Mahls fakka
fawn Taifitaju: Ko darri t-
jeb arrig taws Darbs fazzih-
Tam ne irr Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Waj tam! kas us to Te-
wu fakka: Ko tu dsemidina?
us to Seewu: Ko tu dsemde?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Ta fakka tas KUNGā
tas Swehtajs eekich Israēta/
winna Padarritajs : Gribb-
juhs no mannim nahkamas L-
tas waizabt pahr manne-
Behrneem? woj juhs man V-
wehletchann dohfeet pahr in-
nu Rohkas Darbu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Es efinu to Semmi d-
rijs/ un to Zilweku wire t-
raddijs. Es efinutas/ man-
Rohkas irr to Debbesi ispla-
juſch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
